affected_version: PX4 main around 2025-10; interface library before PR 160

control_plane_symptom: Ctrl+C shutdown occurred before unregister publication

root_cause: ROS shutdown order prevented publisher use during destruction
relevance_to_locked_commit: Locked commit c3e410f descends from the fix; P0-D observed one unregister request.

affected_version: new PX4 with interface library before 2026-06-15

candidate_oracle: installation: activation then fresh setpoint configuration/consumption
relevance_to_locked_commit: Locked commit includes c6a0f7 and subsequent setpoint-type changes.
